title: epacris mutabilis
intro: Epacris mutabilis, also known as the Variable Epacris or Changeable Heath, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Ericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Epacris mutabilis include its potential to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Epacris mutabilis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
